english translation text: Help me, O my master Reza

urdu transliteration text:
*Rozo shab shaamo sahar, Ye wazifa hai mera
Gardishe ayyam me ghir kar mei bilkul choor tha
Trapped in daily miseries, I lay totally shattered
english translation text: Morn and eve, day and night, this is my recitation

urdu transliteration text:
Zindagi se door apne Aap se bhi door tha
Us ghari mujhko tere Dar ka sahara milgaya
english translation text:
Estranged from life, estranged from my own soul
At that time, I got the support of your (generous) door
Help me, O my master Reza

urdu transliteration text:
Kon hai dilki muraade jo yaha paata nahi
Aap ke dar se koi bhi khaali haath jaata nahi
english translation text:
Who is it whose deepest wishes are not answered here?
No one is ever turned away empty-handed from your door

urdu transliteration text: Humko dar se aapke Auqaat se zyaada mila
english translation text: We received more than we deserved from your door
Help me, O my master Reza

urdu transliteration text:
Khalq mei mash’hoor hai mushkil kushaai Aapki
Kar rahe hai jaano dil midhat saraayi Aapki
english translation text:
Your help in distress is known across the world
Our hearts and souls are chanting your lofty praises

urdu transliteration text:
Door ho mushkil hamaari
Ai mere mushkil kusha
english translation text:
May all our problems be solved
O solver of my problems
Help me, O my master Reza

urdu transliteration text:
Jo tabibo ki nazar mei tha mareeze la ilaaj
De rahi thi maut ko bhi zindagi jis ki khiraaj
english translation text:
The one who, in the eyes of physicians, was incurably diseased
The one whose life was being conveyed to certain death

urdu transliteration text:
Wo mareeze la dawa
That incurable patient
Dar par tera acha huwa

english translation text: Help me, O my master Reza

urdu transliteration text:
Mil nahi sakti mere Maula teri koi misaal
Jaane Ahmed roohe Haider Fatema Zehra ke laaal
english translation text:
O my master! The like of you can never be found
The heart of Ahmed, the soul of Haider, the beloved of Fatema Zehra

urdu transliteration text:
Ai Shehen Shaahe Khurasaan
Ibne Shaahe Karbala
english translation text:
O the King of Khurasan!
Son of the King of Karbala
Help me, O my master Reza
